'''''Black Butcher''''' was the personal [[Starship/Legends|starship]] of [[Vin Feal]]. Originally a stock [[Nova-Drive]] [[3-Z light freighter]], Feal modified the vessel by adding a starboard dual [[Laser cannon/Legends|laser cannon]] and a top-mounted laser cannon.

==Sources==
*<!-- 1991-06-XX -->''[[Planets of the Galaxy, Volume One]]''
*<!-- 1994-11-XX -->''[[The Star Wars Planets Collection]]''
